expectations.evidence: 02-websocket-server.md: 'WebSocket is chosen over SSE because the chat feature requires bidirectional communication — clients must both send and receive messages in real time, and SSE is server-to-client only.'
5 todos: DB (01), WS server (02), API routes (03), UI (04), read-receipts UI (05). Reasonable layer-based split.
04-chat-ui.md has 11 items — kept all UI in one large todo. Shows willingness to keep cohesive work together.
Detailed: WsMessage discriminated union types, IntersectionObserver for read tracking, debounce timing (500ms), specific component prop signatures.
